name: PPTAgent
what_it_does: Agentic framework that automatically generates complete PowerPoint presentations from documents, research topics, or freeform prompts, with reflective design capabilities and text-to-image asset generation.
use_cases: Automatically convert research papers or manuscripts into slide decks
Generate product showcase or business presentations from documents
Create educational materials from academic content with visual design
Produce conference or seminar presentations from research topics via web research
Batch presentation generation pipelines via MCP server integration
not_for: Simple slide editing or minor presentation tweaks
Environments without multiple API key access (MinerU, Tavily, LLM endpoint)
Teams needing branded template compliance without significant customization
best_when: You need to automate end-to-end creation of richly designed presentations from documents or research topics, and can provide the required API keys for online mode.
avoid_when: You only need occasional slide generation, or cannot manage the multi-API setup complexity; simpler tools like Gamma.app may suffice.

auth.notes: Requires multiple API keys: MinerU (14-day validity, document processing), Tavily (web search), and an LLM endpoint (Claude, Gemini, or GLM-4.7). Offline mode reduces but does not eliminate requirements.

pricing.notes: Framework itself is open source; running costs depend on LLM API usage (Claude/Gemini), Tavily search API, and MinerU document processing API.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Context overflow management mentioned; specific error handling documentation is limited
known_agent_gotchas: MinerU API keys expire after 14 days — agents must handle credential rotation
Online mode requires three separate API services all operational simultaneously
Docker Compose startup required for containerized deployment adds orchestration complexity
Context overflow management is a documented concern during long generation tasks

security_score_components.security_notes: Community/specialized tool. Apply standard security practices for category. Review documentation for specific security requirements.
